title: What to Know About King Charles and Queen Camilla’s U.S. State Visit Hosted by Trump
summary_full: The British royals are set to arrive on Monday for a visit hosted by President Trump, with a garden party, an address to Congress and a banquet on the schedule.
summary_public: The British royals are set to arrive on Monday for a visit hosted by President Trump, with a garden party, an address to Congress and a banquet on the schedule.
